title: Ambient Layer Calibration
description: Calibration metrics: check verdicts, block rates, patterns, session outcomes

panels.title: Checks Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(*) as total FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Block Rate (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN guardrail_action = 'block' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as block_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Check Verdicts by Type
panels.query: SELECT check_type, guardrail_action as action, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY check_type, action ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Verdict Distribution Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as hour, guardrail_action as action, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY hour, action ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Top Blocked Patterns
panels.query: SELECT guardrail_policy as pattern, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND guardrail_action = 'block' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY pattern ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Block Rate by Check Type
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, check_type, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN guardrail_action = 'block' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as block_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.check' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day, check_type ORDER BY day

panels.title: Sessions by Outcome
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(session_outcome, 'unknown') as outcome, COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as sessions FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.session' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY outcome

panels.title: Sessions Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as sessions FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.session' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
